title: AI YouTube Automation: How to Start a YouTube Channel With AI
summary: Arthur Winer walks through a complete AI-driven YouTube video production workflow from ideation to upload, covering trend research, script generation, voice cloning, AI avatar creation, editing, and content repurposing. The tutorial demonstrates 11 stages of the process using tools including ChatGPT, Claude, HeyGen, Descript, and ElevenLabs, completing a full video in 20 minutes.
writeup: Arthur Winer demonstrates an end-to-end AI workflow for producing a YouTube video, structured across 11 stages from ideation to upload. The process covers trend research, script generation, voice cloning, AI avatar creation, editing, and content repurposing, using ChatGPT, Claude, HeyGen, Descript, and ElevenLabs, with a complete video assembled in 20 minutes. The takeaway is a concrete tool-by-stage pipeline that maps each production step to a specific application.
